Package Character_Classes

Class GameCharacter

java.lang.Object
Character_Classes.GameCharacter
Direct Known Subclasses:
EnemyChar, NPChar, PlayableChar
public class GameCharacter extends Object
Represents an active character entity in the Mirror World of Numazu. Acts as the base class for Yohane, Lailaps, the Siren, and enemy Bats.
Author:
Katigbak and Porciuncula

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected float
    attack
    The attack power used to deal damage to opponents.
    protected String
    dialogue
    The dialogue spoken by the character during world interactions.

    protected String

    The X and Y coordinates mapping the position on the 2D dungeon grid.

    y
    The X and Y coordinates mapping the position on the 2D dungeon grid.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameCharacter(String name, float health, float attack, int x, int y)
    Constructs a character at a specified grid position with no dialogue.
    GameCharacter(String name, float health, float attack, String dialogue)
    Constructs a character with base stats, dialogue, and sets position to (0,0).
    GameCharacter(String name, String dialogue)
    Constructs a non-combatant character (e.g., Shopkeeper) with dialogue at (0,0).

  • Field Details

    • name

      protected String name
      The name of the character or entity.

    • health

      protected float health
      The current hitpoints (HP). Reaching 0 triggers a defeat or Game Over.

    • attack

      protected float attack
      The attack power used to deal damage to opponents.

    • dialogue

      protected String dialogue
      The dialogue spoken by the character during world interactions.

    • x

      protected int x
      The X and Y coordinates mapping the position on the 2D dungeon grid.

    • y

      protected int y
      The X and Y coordinates mapping the position on the 2D dungeon grid.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameCharacter

      public GameCharacter(String name, float health, float attack, String dialogue)
      Constructs a character with base stats, dialogue, and sets position to (0,0).
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the character
      health - the initial health points
      attack - the base attack power
      dialogue - the text lines spoken by the character

    • GameCharacter

      public GameCharacter(String name, float health, float attack, int x, int y)
      Constructs a character at a specified grid position with no dialogue.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the character
      health - the initial health points
      attack - the base attack power
      x - the starting X coordinate
      y - the starting Y coordinate

    • GameCharacter

      public GameCharacter(String name, String dialogue)
      Constructs a non-combatant character (e.g., Shopkeeper) with dialogue at (0,0).
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the character
      dialogue - the text lines spoken by the character

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns:
      the character's name

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Parameters:
      name - the new name string

    • getHealth

      public float getHealth()
      Returns:
      the current health value

    • setHealth

      public void setHealth(float health)
      Parameters:
      health - the new health value

    • getAttack

      public float getAttack()
      Returns:
      the current attack power

    • setAttack

      public void setAttack(float attack)
      Parameters:
      attack - the new attack value

    • getX

      public int getX()
      Returns:
      the current X grid coordinate

    • setX

      public void setX(int x)
      Parameters:
      x - the new X coordinate

    • getY

      public int getY()
      Returns:
      the current Y grid coordinate

    • setY

      public void setY(int y)
      Parameters:
      y - the new Y coordinate

    • getDialogue

      public String getDialogue()
      Returns:
      the character's dialogue text, or null if none

    • setDialogue

      public void setDialogue(String dialogue)
      Parameters:
      dialogue - the new dialogue string

    • charDeath

      public boolean charDeath()
      Checks if the character's health has reached 0 or less.
      Returns:
      true if health is less than or equal to 0, false otherwise

    • dealDmg

      public void dealDmg(GameCharacter enemy)
      Deals damage to a target enemy based on this character's attack power.
      Parameters:
      enemy - the target GameCharacter to damage

    • takeDmg

      public void takeDmg(float damage)
      Deducts health from this character when taking damage from combat or traps.
      Parameters:
      damage - the amount of health to lose

    • nextTile

      protected Tile nextTile(int direction, Floor floor)
      Calculates the adjacent tile coordinate based on an input direction. Map controls correspond to: 0 (Up/W), 1 (Down/S), 2 (Left/A), and 3 (Right/D).
      Parameters:
      direction - integer value from 0 to 3
      floor - the current Floor grid context
      Returns:
      the destination Tile target

    • move

      public void move(int direction, Floor floor)
      Moves the character to the next tile if valid. If blocked by a breakable wall, this action handles the digging logic instead.
      Parameters:
      direction - movement direction index (0 to 3)
      floor - the current Floor map structure
